suite.name: Lead Api Tests

kw.name: Create Session
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=kfic_api, url=http://172.21.0.123:8080/api/v1, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0

test.name: TC001_Get All Leads

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.
kw.msg: Retrying (RetryAdapter(total=2, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None)) after connection broken by 'NewConnectionError('<urllib3.connection.HTTPConnection object at 0x000001489C72D550>: Failed to establish a new connection: [WinError 10061] No connection could be made because the target machine actively refused it')': /api/v1/leads

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.
